race.comment: DIAMOND WARRIOR (1) had been settling closer but from a wide gate last time went all the way before storming home. Missed a lip and can go one better with a repeat. I LOVE YA MONEY (4) resumed off a short break with a strong fourth at Belmont Park in richer company. Pike stays aboard and is expected to go close. BADGER BOB (5) was well fancied on debut and raced on speed here over 1100m, boxing on fairly for fifth. Better for it and may appreciate the extra ground. Has upside. MYSTIC EMPRESS (9) resumed with a near miss this course and distance, finishing fourth but beaten only a neck in a four-way drive to the line. Fitter and goes close with a repeat.  WATTO'S WARRIOR (2) ran a better race when second-up last start, finishing 3 lengths away in fifth over 1300m at this track. No surprise to see him in the mix.
